events.title: QwenLM/qwen-code Release v0.15.12-preview.3
events.summaryText: ## What's Changed * feat(cli): wrap markdown links in OSC 8 so wrapped URLs stay clickable by @BZ-D in https://github.com/QwenLM/qwen-code/pull/4037 * fix(core): normalize cumulative OpenAI stream deltas to suffixes by @chiga0 in https://github.com/QwenLM/qwen-code/pull/3896 * fix(cli): auto-restore prompt and preserve queue on cancel by @wenshao in https://github.com/QwenLM/qwen-code/pull/4023 * docs(auth): add custom API key wizard PRD by @pomelo-nwu in https://github.com/QwenLM/qwen-code/p...
